description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a long, straight tail. Its plumage is predominantly brown with darker mottled patterns along the back and wings, and lighter brown or tan underparts. The head is rounded with a short, straight beak that is slightly pointed, and the eyes are small and set towards the sides of the head. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail feathers are elongated and appear slightly tattered at the tips. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall posture suggests a bird at rest or in a taxidermied pose. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, mimicking the natural look of feathers.
description: A medium-sized brown bird with mottled plumage, a long straight tail, and a short pointed beak. The body is streamlined and the wings are folded close to the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, mottled brown plumage, and long straight tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail feathers and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings along the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same mottled pattern and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's head, short pointed beak, and the rounded shape of the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with dark spots and streaks on a brown background
